title: Maine Oxy
description: ***.com zoominfo.com/c/maine-oxy/59165071 Founded in 1929, Maine Oxy is a trusted, family-owned leader in supplying industrial, medical, and specialty gases alongside premium welding equipment.Growing from a single location in Auburn to over 20 branches across New England, they provide comprehensive industry solutions and reliable services.For nearly a century, their unwavering dedication to innovation has made them an essential, customer-focused partner for businesses across nine states
